data.revised_prompt:
Single-frame website hero animation specimen for a programming language brand named CHIBA, titled "Type Inference Trace". Visual style: academic compiler lab notebook, precise, quiet, minimal, technical diagram, NOT matrix rain, NOT cyberpunk. Background is warm paper white #FAFAF7, flat matte paper texture very subtle if any. Composition reads like a still frame from a live drawing of a type inference system.

Layout: wide hero banner. On the left, a vertical sequence of code tokens in IBM Plex Mono small caps / mono, very crisp, black or near-black. Stack the following lines top to bottom with generous leading: "let x =", "42", "let f x =", "x + 1.0", "f 3.14".

To the right of each corresponding line, draw thin hairline connector curves in deep forest green #1F6B3E, 1px line weight, flowing rightward toward mono type labels. Some connectors should be fully drawn, some mid-draw, ending in tiny open circles like an oscilloscope or plotting trace just finished. A few labels should appear in a morphing state: a partial faded question mark glyph "?" transitioning into the resolved type, with the question mark partially transparent and the final type text more solid. Type labels are in monospace, tabular, quiet, small: "Int", "Int -> Int", "Float", "Float -> Float", "Float".

Top header label, understated and small, aligned near top edge: "HERO ANIMATION / TYPE INFERENCE TRACE / 1 of 2" in mono uppercase. Bottom corner, small metric strip: "L1 - 4.2KB - 8s" in mono. Include a subtle CHIBA brand mark or wordmark only if it fits quietly, no emphasis.

Strict constraints: NO glow, NO gradients, NO shadows, NO 3D, no neon, no cyberpunk elements, no rain, no raster noise, no thick strokes. Only hairline strokes, tabular type, clean spacing, careful alignment, academic diagram feel. Minimal color palette: paper white background, black typography, deep forest green connectors, maybe muted gray for secondary labels. The entire image should feel like a precise compiler trace diagram in motion frozen at an instant.
